title: CAPM: If the expected return on a portfolio is greater than...
summary: Apply the Capital Asset Pricing Model to calculate expected returns or evaluate security pricing.
prompt: If the expected return on a portfolio is greater than the risk-free rate, the portfolio is considered to be risk-free.
solution: A higher expected return does not imply that the portfolio is risk-free; it may still carry significant risk depending on its composition and market conditions.
